text.title: Crash Pipeline As Code Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (precondition_pass, downstream_consumer, stakes) to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all "Applies If" bullets hold AND no "Skip If" bullet matches?

conclusion.verdict: skip Crash Pipeline As Code; route to the correct methodology

branch.question: Is there a downstream consumer (agent OR human reviewer) for the artefact?

conclusion.verdict: single-use throwaway; do not pay the contract overhead

branch.question: Stakes level — does a wrong decision block a release or trigger a regulator?

conclusion.verdict: run Crash Pipeline As Code; review_for_compliance gate via opus
run Crash Pipeline As Code; synthesize_artefact via sonnet
run Crash Pipeline As Code but cap at one instance; draft_inputs_summary via haiku

text.example: precondition_pass=true → downstream_consumer=true → stakes=medium → conclusion r2-symbol-verification: run Crash Pipeline As Code with named owner, synthesize via sonnet.
